hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); [ -z "$file_path" ] && exit 0; ext="${file_path##*.}"; ext="${ext,,}"; case "$ext" in pdf|docx|xlsx|pptx|jpg|jpeg|png|gif|bmp|mp3|wav|m4a|flac|mp4|webm|mov) output_file="${file_path%.*}.md"; if python3 -m markitdown "$file_path" -o "$output_file" 2>/dev/null; then printf "%s" "{\"hookSpecificOutput\": {\"hookEventName\": \"PreToolUse\", \"updatedInput\": {\"file_path\": \"$output_file\"}}}"; fi ;; esac'
